one_time_description: Province of BC - land acquisition deferred revenue contribution of $3,000,000 received during the year
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Shackan Development Corporation (100%), K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.50%), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership (20%). Shackan Development Limited Partnership is fully consolidated. Defined contribution pension plan in place for full-time employees.
notes: Shackan Development Limited Partnership is fully consolidated (num_subsidiaries=1). Three entities accounted for by modified equity method: Shackan Development Corporation, K'en T'em Limited Partnership, Spayum Holdings LP (num_gbes=3). Large $3M Province of BC land acquisition contribution received and fully deferred. Special Projects expenses jumped dramatically from $244K to $6.38M year-over-year. Community Operations & Maintenance ISC funding dropped from $7.78M to $1.18M. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Restricted cash reduced to zero per cash flow (CMHC reserve released). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($8,109,248) + Province of BC ($2,319,627) + CMHC ($125,404) + FNESC ($63,172) + Government of Canada ($1,104,027) + New Relationship Trust ($260,000) + First Nation Health Authority ($17,831) + Trust distribution ($15,533) + Other government per segment ($235,679 residual) = approximately $12,250,521. OSR includes band contracts, earnings from partnerships, investment income, rental income, and Nlaka'pamux Legacy Trust.
